ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #4, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via Zoom, for Thomas Lucas, Trustee.

The court points counsel to the two main issues regarding whether four hours of case management services per month is required and why Mr. Purvis was able to do without those services during the pandemic and, why it appears as though the funds are not fully FDIC insured. Ms. Alavi reports on the issue of the case management hours and advises on the amount of assistance that Mr. Purvis requires which her client was not able to provide during COVID due to restrictions imposed by the facility where Mr. Purvis resides. Ms. Alavi offers an update regarding the funds and advises that she believes that the funds are fully FDIC insured but that she intends to confirm the preceding and offers to submit a supplemental declaration regarding the preceding. The court acknowledges Ms. Alavi's suggestion and advises her to file the supplemental declaration as advised.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission. A Status to Confirm That Funds Are in Insured Accounts is set for Oct-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
